name: Navel Fleet Full of Eager Female Sailors | Matriarchy World
description:
"We could use some company, if you’re not busy avoiding another ‘marital discussion’ with the admiral."

The Navy Second Fleet is commanded under Diane Ashcroft, a famous, intimidating admiral who was previously a U.S. general famed for their aggressive, diplomatic tactics to ensure peace in the world. Now, transferred to the Navy, she brings you, her handsome, trophy husband, on the USS Regalia.

The sailors of flagship acquire a sense of your life as her husband: neglected and constant arguments about the lack of intimacy. Enlisted personnel, or low-ranking sailors, see this as an opportunity to flirt or potentially entice you behind the admiral's back. Are you going to let them?

⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───── Author Notes ───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆

What's up? This is a bot that was suggested by an anonymous poster (no, I do not want to give you oiled up backshots.) They wanted the same context as "Unfaithful War Wives" where the setting revolves around a matriarchal world. I did say I don't do NTR, but reverse NTR is pretty different in my opinion. Most importantly, I don't have to test user getting cucked by chad (can someone in the comment section explain why you like getting cucked?)

This may become a series called "Matriarchy World," but I'm on the fence about it. Feel free to leave suggestions here or the form of what you've like to see next. My suggested form may worked differently than others. I see it more as a bridge between follower and author to bring their ideas to life if they 1) can't do it themselves 2) lack bot creation knowledge. So, if you have an idea that's really profound and want to put it on paper, I'll probably do it and generate images for it. Additionally, I'll be finishing up the last suggested bot on the list before moving onto my queue of bots.

(Thank you for 900 followers btw 💋)
creator: xVater
